extraction.one_line_summary: CORT Nielsen soloed from breakaway up final 2km climb at Cuyera, held off charging ROGLIC by meters despite driving break all day.
tactical_patterns: Bike Exchange paced peloton after missing break—rare tactical shift suggesting Matthews targeted stage win not GC defense.
Movistar putting eight riders front after crosswinds signals renewed stage-hunting aggression unlike passive 2020 Vuelta approach.
VAN BAARLE drove crosswinds on bridge approach pre-climb, isolating lightweight ELLISON before climb even started at 114lbs.

rider_signals.CORT Magnus: positive: drove breakaway entire day then still had power reserve to beat ROGLIC's sprint on 2km climb
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: took back red jersey with second place, clearly superior to GC rivals on short steep finish
rider_signals.ELLISON Kenny: negative: lost red jersey before climb started, destroyed by flat crosswinds at 114lbs despite climbing strength
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: neutral: chased hard for stage but BikeExchange's unusual pace-setting strategy backfired when he couldn't close gap
rider_signals.VAN BAARLE Dylan: positive: tactically savvy crosswind attack on bridge isolated ELLISON, showing residual Sky/Ineos tactics knowledge
